title: Support for Distributed Applications
text: Support for Distributed Applications Uniface applications are normally distributed over networked computers, with components, data, and resources located and communicating with each other by means of various types of middleware. Content Overview The information in this collection describes the servers, connectors, and features that enable Uniface applications to be distributed over a network.
